enable_recall.name: Enable recall injection
enable_recall.hint: Inject recalled memories into the LLM 'memory' system prompt section.

zh.name: 启用记忆召回
zh.hint: 向 system prompt 的 memory 段注入召回结果

zh.name: 召回 Top-K
zh.hint: 每次召回返回的最大记忆数

max_recall_chars.name: Max recall block chars
max_recall_chars.hint: Truncate recall block to N chars before injecting.

zh.name: 召回文本最大长度
zh.hint: 注入到 prompt 前截断的字符数

hippocampus_chunk_threshold.name: Hippocampus trigger (chunks)
hippocampus_chunk_threshold.hint: Conversation chunks to accumulate before background extraction.

zh.name: 海马体触发阈值
zh.hint: 对话块累积到此数量后触发后台提取

reflection_threshold.name: Reflection trigger (facts)
reflection_threshold.hint: Facts count per entity to trigger reflection generation.

zh.name: 升维反思阈值
zh.hint: 每实体 facts 数达到此值时生成 reflection

extraction_model.name: Extraction model
extraction_model.hint: LLM for fact extraction (empty = use default fast LLM).

zh.name: 事实提取模型
zh.hint: 用于事实提取的 LLM（留空则用默认 fast LLM）

reflection_model.name: Reflection model
reflection_model.hint: LLM for high-level reflection (empty = use default LLM).

zh.name: 反思模型
zh.hint: 用于升维反思的 LLM（留空则用默认 LLM）

decay_interval_hours.name: Decay cycle interval (hours)
decay_interval_hours.hint: How often the forgetting cycle runs. Set 0 to disable.

zh.name: 遗忘周期间隔（小时）
zh.hint: 衰减遗忘任务运行间隔，0 = 关闭

persona_evolution_interval_hours.name: Persona evolution interval (hours)
persona_evolution_interval_hours.hint: How often the three-tier persona funnel runs (default = 7 days).

zh.name: 人设演进间隔（小时）
zh.hint: 三级人设漏斗运行间隔（默认 7 天）

enable_persona_evolution.name: Enable Tier-3 persona leap
enable_persona_evolution.hint: Allow reflections to merge into persona (destructive). Off by default.

zh.name: 启用三级人设跃迁
zh.hint: 允许 Reflection 合并到核心人设（破坏性，默认关闭）

zh.name: 启用自我觉察采集
zh.hint: 采集 Bot 自身行为反思（Phase 1，只写不读）

auto_disable_simple_memory.name: Auto-disable simple memory
auto_disable_simple_memory.hint: Disable kira_plugin_simple_memory on startup if enabled.

zh.name: 自动禁用 simple_memory
zh.hint: 启动时若发现 kira_plugin_simple_memory 仍启用则自动禁用

migrate_simple_memory_on_first_run.name: Migrate simple memory data
migrate_simple_memory_on_first_run.hint: One-shot import simple_memory's core.txt lines as facts.

zh.name: 迁移 simple_memory 数据
zh.hint: 首次启动一次性导入 simple_memory 的 core.txt
